name: Equitable Relief from Joint Liability

eligibility.description: Available when it is inequitable to hold the individual liable based on all facts and circumstances, even if the tax was correctly reported but not paid.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a 'catch-all' relief for taxpayers who do not qualify for Innocent Spouse or Separation of Liability relief but where it would be unfair to hold them liable for unpaid tax or a deficiency.
